vulnerability.title: Install the opensc Package For Multifactor Authentication
vulnerability.description: The opensc package can be installed with the following command: $ sudo dnf install opensc
vulnerability.recommendation: Remediation script: # Remediation is applicable only in certain platforms if rpm --quiet -q kernel-core; then if ! rpm -q --quiet "opensc" ; then dnf install -y "opensc" fi else >&2 echo 'Remediation is not applicable, nothing was done' fi

triage_decision.reason: The opensc package provides multifactor authentication support and is recommended for installation.

previous_attempts.scan_output: Single-rule scan failed for package_opensc_installed (rule=xccdf_org.ssgproject.content_rule_package_opensc_installed). Could not verify.

reasoning_messages.reasoning:
The problem is to install the `opensc` package on Rocky Linux 10 to provide multifactor authentication support.

### Solution
<answer>
